---
title: "The Environment of: Industrial Decarbonization"
description: |
 Follow along as Aidan O'Neil explores how industry can aid in the climate crisis!
image: decarb_ep.png
date: 12-8-2025
format:
  html:
    lightbox: TRUE
---

<iframe data-testid="embed-iframe" style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/episode/7pClhDjcTZSWGqQtNeRAM3?utm_source=generator&t=0" width="100%" height="352" frameBorder="0" allowfullscreen="" allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>

In this episode host Kylie Keenan takes a deep dive into the world of industrial decarbonization with guest Bren PhD student, Aidan O’Neil. From policy implementation to environmental justice to the origins of your favorite clean-energy beer, tune in to learn about how the industrial sector can convert to green energy and the research behind it. Join us as we take a trip behind the scenes and investigate where everyday items come from, the environmental costs they incur, and what’s being done to mitigate them.



Check out Aidan’s National Report on December 15th and his webinar with senators from Rhode Island and New Mexico on December 16th!

### Show Notes
Guest: Aidan O’Neil

Our Instagram: @envionmentofitall
[Our LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/theenvironmentofitall/)

### Credits: 
Kylie Keenan - Host 
Ian Del Tredici - Producer | Writer
Leila Zavala - Assistant Producer | Social Media
Malie Quinn - Audio Engineer & Editor 
Cara Sandford - Writer
Taylor Platz - Outreach Coordinator
Jasmine Schwam - Executive Producer

Original Music by Maile Quinn 


### Special Thanks: 
Alexandra Phillips 
Joanna Tang 
UCSB Science Communication Club 

Sponsored by: The Green Initiative Fund (TGIF)
